name: read_csv
short_description: Import package pin and port placement information
full_help:
read_csv

Description: 
Import package pin and port placement information

Syntax: 
read_csv  [-quiet_diff_pairs] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-quiet_diff_pairs]  Suppress warnings about differential pair inference 
                       when importing I/O ports
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>               Pin Planning CSV file

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suppress warnings about differential pair inference when importing I/O ports
Suspend message limits during command execution
